references.name: Montblanc
references.takeaway: Use deep ink-navy backgrounds (#1A1A2E) with whisper-thin serif headlines in white, and pace each content section at full viewport height with slow opacity transitions between them, creating the meditative rhythm of a pen touching paper.

applied.implementation: Deep ink-navy (#0a1628) used as the --bg color token; every surface sits on this dark water canvas
Playfair Display serif font at 2rem with white (#ffffff) color and letter-spacing 0.02em creating whisper-thin serif headlines
Ink diffusion dissolve transition between views uses CSS blur+opacity (0.4s dissolve, 0.5s coalesce) creating slow meditative rhythm
GSAP ScrollTrigger reveals content elements sequentially with 0.5s duration and staggered delays, pacing the viewport experience

references.name: Pilot Pen
references.takeaway: Apply a vertical gradient that deepens from light to dark as the page scrolls downward (#0F72B7 to #054A7A), creating an ink-well depth illusion where content nearer the bottom feels submerged in denser fluid.

applied.implementation: Surface color (#0f1e38) is slightly lighter than background (#0a1628), creating layered depth. Deadline cards use rgba(26,48,80,0.3) for additional depth layering
Left rail has inset box-shadow (inset -2px 0 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.2)) creating an ink-well recess effect that darkens at the edge
Nav items shift from neutral text opacity to gold (#c8a84e) active state, simulating ink color-change chemistry between hover and active

references.name: Sumi Ink Club
references.takeaway: Use brush-stroke SVG textures as section dividers and decorative borders—thick horizontal ink-swipes with visible bristle marks and feathered edges that separate content blocks like calligraphic rule lines on handmade paper.

applied.implementation: CSS clip-path polygon creating tapered brush-stroke shape (0% 0%, 2% 100%, 70% 100%, 75% 0%) with gold gradient fill, simulating calligraphic rule lines
Similar tapered clip-path (0% 0%, 1% 100%, 80% 100%, 85% 0%) with gold-to-border gradient, creating thinner brush strokes between content sections
Bottom-edge clip-path accent strokes on project cards creating feathered calligraphic endings
Tapered gradient lines under column headers mimicking brush-drawn horizontal rules
Playfair Display (organic calligraphic feel) mixed with Source Sans 3 (clean digital type), blending handcraft aesthetic with structured layout readability
